send.no_wallet: Error: Your wallet is not configured.
send.no_recipient: Error: Could not find wallet for user {{target}}.

request.notify_recipient: 🔔 [REQUEST] {{sender}} is requesting {{amount}} XLM from you. Reply with: SEND {{amount}} {{senderPhone}}

invite_member.not_creator: Error: You are not the creator of any group.
invite_member.notify_recipient:
🔔 [INVITE] {{sender}} invited you to join their savings group "{{groupName}}".

Reply with: JOIN GROUP {{groupId}}

group_status.no_groups: You are not part of any groups.

contribute.no_group: Error: You are not part of any group.
contribute.amount_mismatch: ❌ Contribution must be exactly {{required}} XLM as required by this group.

validation.invalid_format: ❌ Invalid amount format. Please enter a positive number (e.g., 10 or 10.50).
validation.zero_amount: ❌ Amount must be greater than zero.
validation.precision_exceeded: ❌ Amount cannot have more than 7 decimal places.
validation.exceeds_max: ❌ Amount exceeds the maximum allowed (1,000,000 XLM).

withdraw.no_group: Error: You are not part of any group.

help.text:
*Kolo Commands:*

_Account_
BALANCE
HISTORY
PROFILE

_Payments_
SEND <amount> <@user>
REQUEST <amount> <@user>

_Savings Groups_
CREATE GROUP <name> <amount> <frequency>
JOIN GROUP <groupId>
INVITE MEMBER <@user>
GROUP STATUS
CONTRIBUTE <amount>
WITHDRAW <amount>

_Support_
HELP
SUPPORT
